<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="cover-page"><div class="cover-main"><div class="title-plaque cover-plaque"><div class="kicker">KAMI · SLIDES DEMO</div><h1>把 AI 文档<br />排成馆藏文稿</h1><p>深蓝外框 / 旧纸内页 / 档案题签</p></div><div class="cover-side"><div class="cover-copy">Just tell Claude what you need:<br />“帮我生成一份白皮书” / “生成一份项目方案” / “帮我写一份推荐信” / “做一套汇报 slides”</div><div class="cover-metrics"><div class="metric-card flow-metric-card"><div class="metric-value">05</div><div class="metric-label">demo set</div><div class="metric-note">docs + slides</div></div><div class="metric-card flow-metric-card"><div class="metric-value">01</div><div class="metric-label">visual rule</div><div class="metric-note">archive blue</div></div></div></div></div><div class="cover-meta">2026.04 · Kami Fork</div></div><div class="folio-footer"><span>REPUBLICAN MANUSCRIPT EDITION</span><span>01 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">01 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">生成原理</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">好看的本质不是每次重新设计，而是把内容填进稳定模板。</div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:69.12px;top:196.80px;width:241.92px;height:235.20px;"><div class="archive-label">STEP 01</div><h3>路由</h3><p>先判断语言与文档类型：one-pager、long-doc、letter、slides。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:344.64px;top:196.80px;width:241.92px;height:235.20px;"><div class="archive-label">STEP 02</div><h3>整理</h3><p>把 raw material 拆成事实、数字、判断和行动，而不是直接堆文字。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:620.16px;top:196.80px;width:241.92px;height:235.20px;"><div class="archive-label">STEP 03</div><h3>填充</h3><p>使用固定骨架承载内容，避免 AI 每次自由发挥版式。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:895.68px;top:196.80px;width:241.92px;height:235.20px;"><div class="archive-label">STEP 04</div><h3>校验</h3><p>构建脚本检查页数、字体、占位符与 CSS 约束。</p></div><div class="fixed-box principle-summary" style="left:124.80px;top:504.96px;width:960.00px;height:43.20px;">固定版式 + design token + 字体层级 + 构建校验</div><div class="folio-footer"><span>METHOD</span><span>02 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">02 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">民国文稿视觉语言</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">不做复古海报，不做重纹理，只把专业文档整理成被认真归档过的样子。</div><div class="fixed-box swatch-card" style="left:74.88px;top:206.40px;width:211.20px;height:225.60px;"><div class="swatch-box" style="background:#243851;"></div><h3>Archive Blue</h3><div class="hex">#243851</div><div class="use">外框 / 题签 / 强调</div></div><div class="fixed-box swatch-card" style="left:343.68px;top:206.40px;width:211.20px;height:225.60px;"><div class="swatch-box" style="background:#EBE5DD;"></div><h3>Old Paper</h3><div class="hex">#EBE5DD</div><div class="use">正文纸面</div></div><div class="fixed-box swatch-card" style="left:612.48px;top:206.40px;width:211.20px;height:225.60px;"><div class="swatch-box" style="background:#F3EFEB;"></div><h3>Ivory</h3><div class="hex">#F3EFEB</div><div class="use">卡片与浮层</div></div><div class="fixed-box swatch-card" style="left:881.28px;top:206.40px;width:211.20px;height:225.60px;"><div class="swatch-box" style="background:#D0C7BB;"></div><h3>Border</h3><div class="hex">#D0C7BB</div><div class="use">细线和分隔</div></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card callout-card" style="left:115.20px;top:484.80px;width:1008.00px;height:84.48px;"><h3>装饰边界</h3><p>只允许蓝色题签、细双线内框、档案边框；不加入纹理图片、印章贴图和竖排正文。</p></div><div class="folio-footer"><span>DESIGN TOKENS</span><span>03 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">03 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">现在能生成什么</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">中文 v1 的正式能力聚焦三类高频文档，简历和作品集已保留为补充样例。</div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:72.00px;top:194.88px;width:322.56px;height:117.12px;"><div class="archive-label">1 PAGE</div><h3>One-Pager</h3><p>公司介绍、项目方案、执行摘要。重点是 30 秒抓住核心。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:436.80px;top:194.88px;width:322.56px;height:117.12px;"><div class="archive-label">MULTI</div><h3>Long Doc</h3><p>白皮书、长文报告、年度总结。强调章节结构与证据链。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:801.60px;top:194.88px;width:322.56px;height:117.12px;"><div class="archive-label">1 PAGE</div><h3>Letter</h3><p>正式信件、推荐信、推荐函。关系、证据、匹配、推荐。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:254.40px;top:350.40px;width:322.56px;height:117.12px;"><div class="archive-label">DEMO</div><h3>Resume</h3><p>固定坐标版简历样例，适合验证蓝框档案式布局。</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:619.20px;top:350.40px;width:322.56px;height:117.12px;"><div class="archive-label">DEMO</div><h3>Portfolio</h3><p>作品集样例，保留更多视觉叙事与项目卡片。</p></div><div class="folio-footer"><span>TEMPLATES</span><span>04 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">04 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">不用 slash command</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">用户只要说任务，skill 根据意图选择模板。输出是文档，不是聊天里的格式建议。</div><div class="fixed-box prompt-row" style="left:96.00px;top:192.00px;width:835.20px;height:46.08px;"><div class="text">“帮我生成一份白皮书”</div><div class="prompt-route">LONG-DOC</div></div><div class="fixed-box prompt-row" style="left:96.00px;top:261.12px;width:835.20px;height:46.08px;"><div class="text">“生成一份项目方案”</div><div class="prompt-route">ONE-PAGER</div></div><div class="fixed-box prompt-row" style="left:96.00px;top:330.24px;width:835.20px;height:46.08px;"><div class="text">“帮我写一份推荐信”</div><div class="prompt-route">LETTER</div></div><div class="fixed-box prompt-row" style="left:96.00px;top:399.36px;width:835.20px;height:46.08px;"><div class="text">“帮我把这些内容排版成好看的 PDF”</div><div class="prompt-route">INFER</div></div><div class="fixed-box prompt-row" style="left:96.00px;top:468.48px;width:835.20px;height:46.08px;"><div class="text">“做一套汇报 slides”</div><div class="prompt-route">SLIDES</div></div><div class="fixed-box auto-banner" style="left:971.52px;top:192.00px;width:134.40px;height:324.48px;">AUTO<br />TRIGGER</div><div class="folio-footer"><span>NATURAL PROMPTS</span><span>05 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">05 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">排版骨架不变</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">我们换的是时代气质，不是阅读效率。信息密度、留白与页数约束仍然可控。</div><div class="fixed-box metric-card" style="left:91.20px;top:199.68px;width:211.20px;height:113.28px;"><div class="metric-value">1</div><div class="metric-label">one-pager</div><div class="metric-note">严格单页</div></div><div class="fixed-box metric-card" style="left:334.08px;top:199.68px;width:211.20px;height:113.28px;"><div class="metric-value">1</div><div class="metric-label">letter</div><div class="metric-note">严格单页</div></div><div class="fixed-box metric-card" style="left:576.96px;top:199.68px;width:211.20px;height:113.28px;"><div class="metric-value">3</div><div class="metric-label">demo long-doc</div><div class="metric-note">章节展开</div></div><div class="fixed-box metric-card" style="left:819.84px;top:199.68px;width:211.20px;height:113.28px;"><div class="metric-value">500+</div><div class="metric-label">check rules</div><div class="metric-note">字体 / CSS / 占位符</div></div><ul class="fixed-box bullet-list" style="left:105.60px;top:408.00px;width:1017.60px;height:115.20px;"><li>旧纸底不是装饰图，而是稳定色块。</li><li>题签和细线负责时代感，正文仍按专业文档阅读。</li><li>京華老宋体用于 serif 气质，功能文字保持清晰。</li></ul><div class="folio-footer"><span>LAYOUT RHYTHM</span><span>06 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box section-kicker" style="left:67.20px;top:55.68px;width:230.40px;height:19.20px;">06 · SECTION</div><div class="fixed-box section-title" style="left:67.20px;top:88.32px;width:547.20px;height:52.80px;">交付链路</div><div class="fixed-box section-rule" style="left:67.20px;top:148.80px;width:403.20px;height:1.92px;"></div><div class="fixed-box section-lede" style="left:672.00px;top:86.40px;width:460.80px;height:72.96px;">生成不止是写文件，还要让 PDF/PPTX 和预览资产都能被检查。</div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:86.40px;top:259.20px;width:225.60px;height:122.88px;"><div class="archive-label">01</div><h3>HTML / PPTX</h3><p>内容进入固定模板</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:360.96px;top:259.20px;width:225.60px;height:122.88px;"><div class="archive-label">02</div><h3>Build</h3><p>生成交付文件</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:635.52px;top:259.20px;width:225.60px;height:122.88px;"><div class="archive-label">03</div><h3>Verify</h3><p>检查页数、字体、占位符</p></div><div class="fixed-box archive-card with-label" style="left:910.08px;top:259.20px;width:225.60px;height:122.88px;"><div class="archive-label">04</div><h3>Preview</h3><p>导出 demo 预览</p></div><pre class="fixed-box pipeline-code" style="left:124.80px;top:499.20px;width:940.80px;height:74.88px;"><code>.venv/bin/python scripts/build.py --verify one-pager
.venv/bin/python scripts/build.py --check
.venv/bin/python scripts/build.py slides</code></pre><div class="folio-footer"><span>DELIVERY</span><span>07 / 08</span></div></div></div>

---

<div class="folio-shell"><div class="folio-sheet"><div class="fixed-box closing" style="left:96.00px;top:177.60px;width:1036.80px;height:364.80px;"><h1>好看的本质是稳定</h1><div class="closing-rule"></div><p>固定版式 · design token · 字体层级 · 构建校验</p><div class="meta">Kami · Republican Manuscript Edition</div></div><div class="folio-footer"><span>END</span><span>08 / 08</span></div></div></div>
